 To summarize:

Isotonic saline (normal saline) is preferred for initial fluid resuscitation in pediatric sepsis due to its effectiveness in restoring intravascular volume quickly and safely. It provides necessary support until further assessment can guide ongoing treatments. ```plaintext Summary: Isotonic saline is首选用于儿童败血症的初始液体复苏，因为它能快速且安全地恢复血管内容积。它提供了必要的支持直到进一步评估指导后续治疗。
``` ```
To summarize:

Isotonic saline (normal saline) is the initial fluid of choice for managing pediatric sepsis due to its proven effectiveness in rapidly expanding circulating volumes and maintaining stable hemodynamics. This approach ensures proper organ灌注并稳定循环状态，在进行更详细的诊断和个体化维持性输液策略之前提供即时的支持。

```
